name: nexus
description: Simulazione urbana multi-agente con economia, democrazia e interfaccia 2D/3D in tempo reale

scripts.dev: concurrently -n sim,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @nexus/server" "npm run dev -w @nexus/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @nexus/simulation && npm run build -w @nexus/server && npm run build -w @nexus/web && npm run build -w @nexus/sdk
